title:
AN ACT MAKING THE MUNICIPALITY OF SOLANA, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, AS
THE SEAT OF THE HIGHWAY ENGINEERING DISTRICT OF THE SECOND
CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT OF THE SAID PROVINCE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 12395 / 65 OG No. 23, 5832 (June 9, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5300, June 15, 1968 ]

AN ACT MAKING THE MUNICIPALITY OF SOLANA, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, AS

THE SEAT OF THE HIGHWAY ENGINEERING DISTRICT OF THE SECOND

CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT OF THE SAID PROVINCE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in

Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.The Municipality of Solana, Province of Cagayan, is hereby made the

seat of the highway engineering district of the second congressional district of the

same province.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 15, 1968.
